NAVAREA XIX 85/26



1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT  250630 UTC JUN 26

NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.



72-32.44N 020-21.36E - TRANFSOCEAN ENABLER

65-18.72N 007-15.67E - ISLAND INNOVATOR

65-08.01N 006-42.26E - TRANSOCEAN ENCOURAGE



NOTES:

A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.

B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW

2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX　84/26
